title: Content library sync
summary: Synced content library scripts and docs from main N5 to Ode export
tasks_completed: Copied content_ingest.py from main N5 (with v4/v5 normalization pipeline)
Verified all scripts pass Python syntax check
Created clean Ode-appropriate quick reference doc
Verified scripts handle missing DB gracefully (auto-create schema)
notes: All scripts use standard library only - no external dependencies
Database auto-creates at N5/data/content_library.db on first use
ContentLibrary class in content_library.py handles schema creation
The main diff was v5 normalization functions in content_ingest.py adding new content types (link, snippet, podcast, video, quote, personal, transcript)
Quick reference doc was rewritten to remove V-specific examples and reference correct scripts
